title: Universal donor myth nuance
script_summary: Exploring the complexities behind the universal donor myth.

segments.voiceover: The universal donor myth—what if it's more complex than you think?
It's widely believed that type O blood is the ultimate lifesaver.
But hold on! Not all type O blood is the same.
There's O positive and O negative, and they react differently in transfusions.
While O negative is the universal donor, its rarity complicates things.
Stay curious, and hit follow for more science insights!
